activated_rules.rule_name: LC exception not activated as no valid LC reference found
General goods description with invoice reference

consignor.certificate_value:
Wellspect Healthcare
P.O Box 14
431 21, Mölndal
Sweden
consignor.invoice_value:
Wellspect Healthcare
PO BOX 14
SE-431 21 Mölndal
SWEDEN
consignor.motivation: The consignor 'Wellspect Healthcare' in the certificate matches exactly the invoice issuer including address and country after allowed normalizations (case, spacing, company form). Land matches Sweden exactly. Rule 4.1.0 confirms consignor name appears in invoice header and address blocks.

consignee.certificate_value:
Paracare SpA
Las Dalias #3072 - Macul
7810864 Santiago de Chile
Chile
consignee.invoice_value:
PARACARE SpA
Las Dalias 3072
Macul 1 Santiago
7810864 Santiago de Chile
consignee.motivation: The consignee 'Paracare SpA' mentioned in the certificate is identically matched in the invoice delivery address field with allowed normalizations (case, spacing, removal of '#'). Country Chile matches exactly in both documents.

goods_description.invoice_value: Rectal Catheter Set Regular 80, Rectal Catheter Set Small 80, Classic System Regular ES, Classic System Small ES, Navina Tube Set 80
goods_description.motivation: The certificate contains a general goods description referring explicitly to the proforma invoice number 0001701171 dated 260129. This matches the invoice number and date exactly, thereby fulfilling rule 4.3.5. Automatic acceptance of general goods description with invoice reference is granted.

quantity.motivation: The certificate quantity of 35 pcs matches exactly the total quantity indicated in the invoice as the sum of individual item quantities: 20 + 10 + 2 + 1 + 2 = 35 pcs. Rule 4.3.5 allows verifying quantity partially via reference to invoice number that matches. Thus quantity is verified as MATCH.

origin.motivation: The certificate specifies Sweden as country of origin, which is explicitly identified in the invoice in dedicated 'Country of Origin' field. The match is exact and complies with allowed EU normalization rules.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points match exactly or with allowed normalization; general goods description with invoice reference confirmed; certificate and invoice data fully consistent.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla uppgifter i certifikatet kan verifieras i fakturan utan avvikelser. Dokumenten är konsekventa och kan godkännas automatiskt.
